summary: Completed comprehensive Trophy Room testing for 6-tier Hunter Rank system with Elden Lord achievement and ultra-HD character styling
passed_tests: Trophy Room displays all 6 Hunter Ranks (E through S-Rank)
E-Rank unlocked by default with checkmark and proper styling
D-Rank through S-Rank properly locked with lock icons
Progress bar shows correct progress (0/25 to D-Rank)
Elden Lord achievement section displays with proper structure
Elden Lord locked state shows greyscale/opacity styling (correct behavior)
Lifetime Statistics section shows missions and runes count at bottom
Helper text displays 'X to D-Rank' and 'Y to Elden Lord'
Character backgrounds display with ultra-HD quality (opacity 0.9, saturate 1.8, contrast 1.2, brightness 1.1)
Blue drop-shadow on left character (Jin-Woo), red drop-shadow on right character (Igris)
All navigation tabs functional (Mission Log, Reward Shop, Trophy Room)
Responsive design works on mobile viewport (390x844)
Hunter Ranks grid adjusts properly for mobile (2-column layout)
